source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/00_기타 작업 서류/251021 - 소재지 변경에 따른 문서 업데이트/참고 - G series 사용 x 공통 DHF 참조/G1417, G1717_Label (Rev.01).pptx

document.title: G1417, G1717 Label
document.revisionOrVersion: Rev.2.0; revision history includes Rev No. 02

sourceSummary.oneLine: Label artwork for G1417 and G1717 digital flat panel X-ray detector models, including domestic, overseas common, detector, sub-label, and box labels.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory labeling content for medical device identification, manufacturer information, certification references, UDI/UDID, rating, packaging, and required warnings.
keyPoints: Domestic labels identify the product as a medical device and list product name, model name, Korean permit number, packing unit, protection class, manufacturer, UDID, serial number, and IP56.

Overseas common labels identify the product as a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector and include manufacturer address, model name, date of manufacture, serial number, UDID, electrical rating, adaptor and battery information, and Made in Korea.
Revision history states Rev No. 02 dated 25.10.10 for manufacturer address revision and EU representative information revision.

evidence.claim: The document covers domestic detector main labels for G1417CW, G1717CW, G1417FW, G1717FW, G1417CWP, G1717CWP, G1417FWP, and G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: 모델명 : G1417CW ... 모델명 : G1717CW ... 모델명 : G1417FW ... 모델명 : G1717FW ... 모델명 : G1417CWP ... 모델명 : G1717CWP ... 모델명 : G1417FWP ... 모델명 : G1717FWP

evidence.claim: The domestic product name is 의료영상획득장치.
The Korean permit number shown on domestic detector labels is 제인 25-4423 호.
Domestic detector labels state packing unit 1 BOX.
Domestic detector labels state protection type and grade as class 1 equipment or internally powered equipment with type B applied part.
evidence.evidenceText: 보호 형식 및 등급 : 1 급 기기 또는 내부전원기기 , B 형 장착부

evidence.claim: The manufacturer address on labels is 2-dong, 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, 17118, Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer: H&abyz Co., Ltd. 2-dong, 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro , Namsa- eup , Cheoin-gu , Yongin-si , Gyeonggi-do, 17118, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: Overseas common detector labels use the product name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: Overseas common detector labels include rating 15V 6 A.
The specified AC/DC adaptor input is 100-240V~, 50-60Hz, 1.3-0.5A and output is 15V 6.0A.
The specified battery is 11.55V, 6660mAh, using MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ Li-ion Battery.
evidence.evidenceText: Battery - 11.55V, 6660mAh (3330mAh x 2EA) Use Only With MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ (Li-ion Battery)

evidence.claim: The detector sub-label includes an FCC Part 15 compliance statement.
evidence.evidenceText: This Device complies with part 15 of the FCC Rules. Operation is subject to the following two conditions

evidence.claim: The detector sub-label includes MSIP identifier MSIP-CRM-LAI-60-2230C.
The box label states ISO13485:2016 Certified Company.
The revision history records Rev No. 02 dated 25.10.10 for manufacturer information address revision and EU representative information revision.
evidence.evidenceText: 02 25.10.10 Manufacturer information (address) revision and EU representative information revision
evidence.pageTarget: G1417 and G1717 Label Revision History

reviewFlags.reason: Source path names the file as Rev.01, while slide revision history includes Rev No. 02 and label artwork shows Rev.2.0.
EU representative information revision is mentioned in revision history, but the extracted source text does not show the EU representative details.
Contains IC and CMIT ID fields appear without populated values in the source text.
Several labels include placeholder fields such as 제조 번호, 제조년월일, Date of Manufacture, Serial Number, UDID, Weight NN.N Kg, and Packing 1BOX.
